full_prompt: Design a payload-handling robotic arm for a student mechanical-design benchmark (2025 theme: automated payload sorting on a 3 m linear track). The arm must reach at least 600 mm horizontally from its base and must lift a 2 kg payload at full reach. The arm base is mounted to a 3 m long linear track and must not overturn while carrying the 2 kg payload at full extension; the base footprint is 300 mm x 300 mm. The arm consists of two links and a 2-finger parallel gripper; total arm mass target is below 5 kg. Cycle time for a pick-place on the track is 10 seconds (this drives actuator sizing but is not a structural gate). Structural pass/fail: at full 600 mm reach with 2 kg payload, the arm-tip vertical deflection must not exceed 5 mm; the root link stress under this load must not exceed 80 MPa (Al 6061-T6 yield 276 MPa with SF 3.5 against repeated operation for 1e6 cycles, approximating high-cycle fatigue). The 2-finger gripper must apply 20 N clamping force with grip-finger deflection under 0.5 mm. Under an emergency-stop lateral impact (100 N at arm tip), the arm must not plastically yield. Primary verification is linear static structural FEA for full-reach gravity load, gripper clamping, and E-stop impact. Fatigue high-cycle check is performed as a stress-amplitude margin (not a separate FEA class; use Goodman diagram check on cyclic stress amplitude). Vibration, thermal, fluid, and radiation analyses are explicitly NOT required. Deliverables: STEP AP242 of the arm assembly, a mass budget, and a report listing arm mass in kg, tip deflection at 2 kg in mm, root stress at full reach in MPa, and cycle time in s.
short_prompt:
Design a payload-handling robotic arm mounted on a 3 m linear track (2025 theme: automated payload sorting). The arm must reach at least 600 mm horizontally and lift a 2 kg payload at full reach. Base footprint 300 x 300 mm; total arm mass <= 5 kg. Target cycle time 10 s for a pick-place (drives actuator sizing, not structural). 1e6-cycle high-cycle fatigue handled via a Goodman/S-N margin on the root link (target stress <= 80 MPa under full-reach load).

Load cases.
- LC1 full-reach static gravity: 2 kg (19.6 N) at arm tip 600 mm out; tip deflection <= 5 mm, root stress <= 80 MPa.
- LC2 gripper clamping: 20 N parallel-gripper clamp force; grip-finger deflection <= 0.5 mm.
- LC3 emergency-stop lateral impact: 100 N at arm tip, no plastic yield.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: 1e6-cycle Goodman diagram check is a post-processing step on FEA stress amplitude, not a separate FEA category.

prompt.title: Payload-handling robotic arm
prompt.brief: Design a 2-link arm with 2-finger gripper reaching 600 mm to lift 2 kg, arm mass ≤ 5 kg, tip deflection ≤ 5 mm.

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: No plastic yield under E-stop impact
